notes: Eval cases test the protocol's routing, gating, and load-bearing safety behaviour. The skill is review-only; the calling skill applies fixes from references/fix-patterns.md and re-invokes. Subjective dimension quality is tested via the per-pass rubrics — see references/rubric-structure.md and references/rubric-readability.md.

cases.description: A structurally sound brief with readability issues should return VERDICT: PASS on a Pass 1 invocation, and VERDICT: FAIL on the first Pass 2 invocation (with readability violations listed in the report).
cases.prompt: Invoke write-report on .claude/skills/write-report/assets/fixtures/brief-good-structure-bad-prose.md with pass=1, doc_type=brief, strictness=standard, manifest declared inline. Then re-invoke with pass=2 and the same audit_dir.

cases.description: A document with no governing observation should return VERDICT: FAIL on Pass 1. A subsequent Pass 2 invocation against the same audit_dir must BLOCK because Pass 1 has not cleared.
cases.prompt: Invoke write-report on .claude/skills/write-report/assets/fixtures/brief-no-thesis.md with pass=1, doc_type=brief, strictness=standard. Then attempt Pass 2 against the same audit_dir without fixing the document.

cases.description: At strictness=high, a D5 violation on a load-bearing code (SECRET-02) in narrative prose must be flagged with preservation_note and suggested_fix_shape — the calling skill needs these to apply the canonical fix from fix-patterns.md without renaming the code locally.
cases.prompt: Invoke write-report on .claude/skills/write-report/assets/fixtures/brief-with-codes.md with pass=2, doc_type=brief, strictness=high, manifest declaring concept_ids pattern. (Pass 1 must have cleared first; the fixture should be structurally sound.)

cases.description: When the calling skill re-invokes with previous_violations pointing at a prior report, the reviewer must grade each prior violation as RESOLVED, RE-ISSUED, or ACCEPTED-WITH-DEFER in the new report.
cases.prompt: Run Pass 1 on a brief, capture the report path, simulate a calling skill applying a subset of fixes, then re-invoke Pass 1 with previous_violations set to the prior report.

cases.description: Negative trigger: a 150-word chat reply should not invoke the full protocol.
cases.prompt: Invoke write-report on a 150-word inline note with pass=1.

cases.description: Negative trigger: a YAML config file should refuse with BLOCKED (binary or non-prose document type).
cases.prompt: Invoke write-report on 12-operations/harness/registry/skill-registry.yaml with pass=1, doc_type=brief.

cases.description: At strictness=high, missing supporting_artifacts manifest must BLOCK pre-flight.
cases.prompt: Invoke write-report on a brief with pass=1, strictness=high but no supporting_artifacts field.

cases.description: Wiki pages use noun-label headings by convention; D1 (readability) should mark N/A.
cases.prompt: Invoke write-report on 08-knowledge/wiki/concepts/skill-engineering.md with pass=2, doc_type=wiki, strictness=standard.
